pitch.role: Symbolic pitch/MIDI mapping; not measured audio.

interval_compactness.role: Exponential decay over pitch distance; score-derived compactness.

register.role: Register band occupancy for registral metrics.

written_dynamics.role: Symbolic dynamic weighting for score analysis; not SPL or loudness.

composite.role: Linear blend of instrument vs interval density after min-max normalization.

limitations: Written dynamics are symbolic score metadata, not loudness.
Instrument profiles are symbolic metadata unless empirical_profile with source data.
Perceptual/acoustic proxy branches removed in 3.0.0–4.0.0 (strictly symbolic).
